Kedaara picks up 5% in Axis Finance for Rs750 crore, sets benchmark for IPO-headed NBFC
india_trends.summary: Axis Finance has raised Rs750 crore from Kedaara Capital for a 5.08% stake, marking its first external funding. This capital boost strengthens its financial base as it jostles in India's extremely competitive credit market—preparing for a future IPO under regulatory requirements.

india_trends.title: IDFC First Bank says ₹590 crore fraud impact behind it, sees strong FY27 growth
india_trends.summary: The lender said new business remained unaffected during the March quarter, though profit fell sequentially after it fully expensed the fraud hit and incurred higher costs.

india_trends.title: Transition at Sonata: Rajsekhar Datta Roy is new CEO as Samir Dhar steps down
india_trends.summary: Sonata haild Roy for being instrumental in guiding the company's AI-first evolution. He has led efforts in advancing a Responsible AI approach, the company said.

india_trends.title: Axis Bank frontloads FY27 provisions amid West Asia war uncertainty
india_trends.summary: The private-sector lender set aside a one-time ₹2,001 crore buffer in Q4, citing macro and geopolitical risks, even as higher provisions weigh on profit and margins face near-term pressure.

india_trends.title: India's financial system and external sector remain resilient despite global volatility and capital outflows: RBI Bulletin
india_trends.summary: The RBI noted that key external sector vulnerability indicators "remained contained" and foreign exchange reserves continued to remain "comfortable" even amid heightened global uncertainty.

india_trends.title: Mukesh, Kishore, Rafi, Lata, Asha... the golden greats are gone, their songs play on
india_trends.summary: The passing of Asha Bhosle at the age of 92 marks the end of an era for Indian music. She was part of an iconic group alongside Lata Mangeshkar, Mohammed Rafi, Kishore Kumar and Mukesh, creating an unparalleled legacy. Their enchanting melodies still resonate deeply with fans today.
